title: Implement real Workbench General Task intake and active-state registration
scope_in: Workbench General Task intake from Owner-entered form data
Normalize intake into accepted General Task schema
Write deterministic repo-safe active General Task artifact
Write active_state.json with exact IDs, git HEAD, timestamps, stale status, sha256 provenance, and READY_FOR_AGENT=false
Import structured Speculum task review into dashboard state
Add/check no-placeholder UI behavior for used actions
scope_out: UI polish beyond necessary action truth

required_checkers.purpose: Validate that Workbench-created General Task data conforms to the accepted General Task schema and contains no placeholder-only success state.
required_checkers.pass_condition: All required General Task fields are present; IDs match GENERAL-TASK-* pattern; scope_in/scope_out are non-empty; source file exists; UTF-8 read succeeds; validation exits 0.
required_checkers.failure_condition: Missing required field, invalid ID, placeholder text treated as real data, malformed JSON/Markdown, mojibake marker, or non-zero exit.

required_checkers.purpose: Prove that active-state registration is explicit, deterministic, stale-aware, and does not imply agent readiness.
required_checkers.pass_condition: active_state.json contains exact git_head 9d5c92c64afcacc40db6e74bcdd1145d5233a44d, general_task_id, selected_task_candidate_id, status not REGISTERED_FOR_AGENT, READY_FOR_AGENT=false, last_checked_at_utc, stale_status, source sha256 fields, and exits 0.
required_checkers.failure_condition: READY_FOR_AGENT true, missing git truth, missing timestamps, no sha256 provenance, stale status absent, mismatched task IDs, or non-zero exit.

required_checkers.purpose: Ensure Speculum review data is imported as structured gate input and cannot be silently ignored.
required_checkers.pass_condition: Review schema_version matches speculum_task_review_response_v0_1; reviewed_task_candidate_id matches selected candidate; verdict is not PENDING; blockers are surfaced; import receipt is created.
required_checkers.failure_condition: Schema mismatch, candidate mismatch, PENDING verdict, missing blockers array, failed import, or import not reflected in active state.

required_checkers.purpose: Block accidental storage of runtime/outbox/bundles/handoff/private context inside E:\IMPERIUM.
required_checkers.pass_condition: No runtime directories, zip bundles, handoff packs, local private context, cache outputs, server logs, or generated scratch files are tracked or newly created inside the repo.
required_checkers.failure_condition: Any forbidden path or artifact appears under E:\IMPERIUM, or git status shows generated runtime/private files.

required_checkers.purpose: Prevent repeating broken encoding in Workbench schemas, templates, dashboard data, receipts, and scripts.
required_checkers.pass_condition: All touched text files decode as UTF-8; known mojibake patterns are absent; line endings are stable; exits 0.
required_checkers.failure_condition: Decode failure, mojibake marker, replacement character, corrupted Cyrillic text, or non-zero exit.

required_checkers.purpose: Prove that Save/Validate/Decompose actions used in this Local Task are real or explicitly disabled, not green placeholder UI.
required_checkers.pass_condition: Workbench buttons either call real checked endpoints/scripts and surface failures, or are visibly disabled with NOT_IMPLEMENTED status. No placeholder action may emit success.
required_checkers.failure_condition: Button displays success without persisted artifact, validation receipt, or error propagation.

blockers.description: Current scope_in includes downstream items: Stage map, Stage review, and Servitor handoff pack. That turns Candidate 1 into a corridor bundle instead of a first Local Task.
blockers.required_resolution: Remove downstream items before modernization. Candidate 1 must stop at Workbench intake, active-state registration, structured review import, local receipts, and checkers.

blockers.description: The word registration is ambiguous and can be misread as agent-ready task registration.
blockers.required_resolution: Rename or constrain it as WORKBENCH_ACTIVE_STATE_ONLY. Keep READY_FOR_AGENT=false and do not create VM2 or Servitor dispatch artifacts.

blockers.description: Workbench Save/Validate/Decompose buttons are known to be mostly placeholder. Placeholder UI cannot be used as proof.
blockers.required_resolution: Either implement real checked Save/Validate behavior for this task or mark unimplemented buttons disabled/NOT_IMPLEMENTED. No success state without persisted artifact and receipt.

blockers.description: The task writes state and receipts; without a repo-purity guard it can pollute E:\IMPERIUM with runtime/outbox/private artifacts.
blockers.required_resolution: Add and run repo_purity_guard_v0_1. Runtime receipts and local context must stay under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT unless the artifact is explicitly repo-safe source state.

blockers.description: Active dashboard state can become stale or detached from exact git HEAD.
blockers.required_resolution: active_state.json and receipts must include exact git_head, last_checked_at_utc, stale_status, source paths, and sha256 values.

blockers.description: Encoding/mojibake has already damaged project materials.
blockers.required_resolution: All new and modified Workbench/Astronomicon text artifacts must pass UTF-8/mojibake guard before any Owner gate.

fake_green_risks.risk: Candidate appears selected in dashboard but no normalized artifact was written or validated.
fake_green_risks.mitigation: Require intake receipt with source_sha256, output_sha256, validator command, and validator exit code.

fake_green_risks.risk: Active-state registration is confused with READY_FOR_AGENT or VM2 dispatch readiness.
fake_green_risks.mitigation: Hard-code expected READY_FOR_AGENT=false in active-state checker and use registration_kind=WORKBENCH_ACTIVE_STATE_ONLY.

fake_green_risks.risk: Workbench button shows green success while backend action is placeholder.
fake_green_risks.mitigation: Add no-placeholder-action checker; success requires persisted artifact plus receipt.

fake_green_risks.risk: Speculum review is exported but not imported into the state gate.
fake_green_risks.mitigation: Require SPECULUM_REVIEW_IMPORT_RECEIPT and candidate ID match check.

fake_green_risks.risk: Dashboard reads old selected_task.json and hides stale state.
fake_green_risks.mitigation: Require last_checked_at_utc, exact git_head, stale_status, and source hashes in active_state.json.

fake_green_risks.risk: Repo appears clean while runtime artifacts were accidentally placed under the repo root.
fake_green_risks.mitigation: Run repo_purity_guard_v0_1 and store runtime receipts under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT.

pass_condition: Workbench intake writes a real normalized artifact
Speculum review import is reflected in state
No placeholder action may emit success
Runtime receipts stay outside repo under E:\IMPERIUM_CONTEXT
UTF-8/mojibake guard passes for touched files
failure_condition: Any button claims success without persisted artifact and receipt
Review is ignored or not reflected in state
active_state lacks git head, timestamps, stale status, or sha256 provenance
